title: neolepia campestris
intro: Neolepia campestris, also known as the desert water fern or desert water flower, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the family Azollaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for treating various skin conditions, such as eczema and acne, due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Neolepia campestris include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and even exhibit antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or topical creams, and are often used in traditional medicine to treat skin issues and other health concerns.
